english_query: why we should not accept something just because many people believe it
ugf_response:
The first idea is that many people can believe a thing at the same time. This is a thing that happens all the time in our world. The second idea is that the number of people who believe a thing does not change if that thing is true or not true. A thing can be true even if only one person knows it, and a thing can be not true even if every person on earth says it is true.

The third idea is the part that follows from these first two ideas. It says that we should not believe a thing just because we see many other people believing it. If we only believe things because of how many people believe them, we might believe things that are not true. We might be wrong just because we want to be like the others.

To see if this thinking is good, we must look at how the ideas fit together. The first idea and the second idea are both true. They are things we know to be real. The third idea follows from them in a good way. If the number of people does not tell us if a thing is true, then we cannot use that number to decide if we should believe the thing. For this reason, the thinking is good and the point being made is strong.

english_query: The expedition council's apparent unanimity is the result of pressure to conform, not genuine agreement. Early dissenters were publicly chastised, leading to self‑censorship and an illusion of consensus that masks serious safety concerns.
ugf_response: First, we see that people who said no were told off in front of others. This makes other people afraid to speak up. They stay quiet not because they think the plan is good, but because they fear being told off too. So the group looks like one mind when it is not. Someone might say the group really does agree now. But if people are hiding their fears, the leaders do not know about real problems. This is bad for the well being of the group. The silence is not real. The group is not really in one mind. The silence hides real problems that could hurt people.

english_query: how doing good things over and over makes you into a good person
ugf_response: First, we look at what a person does in their life. We see that a person does many things every day. Some things are good and some things are not good. When a person does a good thing, it is a single act. This act might not change who that person is inside. Second, we look at what happens when a person does the same good thing many times. If a person helps others many times, it becomes a way of being. The person starts to feel that being good is how they act. Third, we see how these many acts change the mind and the heart. Doing good things makes the person feel good and makes them want to do more. This creates a circle where the good acts lead to more good acts. Finally, we can say that a person is not just one thing they do. A person is the whole of all the things they do most of the time. When the things a person does most of the time are good, then the person is a good person.

english_query: If the door is unlocked, then the door can be opened from outside. The door is locked. Therefore, the door cannot be opened from outside. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says that if the door is not locked, then a person can open it from the outside. This tells us what happens when the door is not locked. Then, we look at the second idea. It says the door is locked. This means the first part of our if-then idea is not true. But the first idea does not tell us what happens when the door is locked. Maybe the door can still be opened from the outside even if it is locked, or maybe it cannot. We do not know for sure. So the last idea does not follow from the earlier ones. does not follow

english_query: Either the visitor is from the north or the visitor is from the south. The visitor is from the north. Therefore, the visitor is not from the south. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says one of two things must be true. The person is from the north or the person is from the south. Next, we look at the second idea. It tells us that the person is from the north. Now we check if the last idea must be true. The last idea says the person is not from the south. The first idea uses the word 'or'. In many cases, 'or' means one or the other or both. If the person can be from both places, then being from the north does not stop them from being from the south. We do not know if the two places are the only choices and if they cannot be true at the same time. Imagine a place that is both north and south of a line. The person could be there. So the second idea is true, the first idea is true, but the last idea could be wrong. So this means we cannot say for sure that the person is not from the south. The last idea does not follow for sure. does not follow

english_query: To be sure, old teacher.
ugf_response: And what is doing what the gods want, and what is not doing what the gods want?

english_query: the idea that you should only follow rules everyone could agree to
ugf_response:
The first idea they put forward is that a person should only do things that are part of the idea that says what to do and that all people could say yes to. They also say that a group of what to do that gets a yes from everyone is the only kind of group of what to do that is good enough to follow.

From that first idea they move to a second idea. They think that if we only do things that fit a group of what to do everyone can say yes to, then we will have a world where people can trust each other and where there is less fighting. They also think that this will let us choose what to do in a way that feels right for the group, and that it will keep us from hurting each other by making a group of what to do be forced on someone who does not agree.

A good part is that it tries to be the same for each and to give each person a voice. That can help people feel not hurt and can make it easier to work together. A not good part is that it can be very hard to find a group of what to do that everybody can say yes to, especially when people have different needs or live in different places. Some groups of what to do that seem needed for being not hurt or for main needs might not get a yes from every single person, and then the idea would stop us from using those groups of what to do. It can also lead to a situation where, if no group of what to do gets all yes, we end up doing nothing at all, and that can let problems grow. So the idea has a good main part in trying to be the same for each, but it may not work well in real life because it asks for the number of yes from all that is often too high.

english_query: Not so much, the hot one, as he who kills him, and not so much as he who is right killed.
ugf_response: How can that be, the old teacher?

english_query: If it is raining, then the ground is wet. The ground is not wet. Therefore, it is not raining. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea, which says that if rain is falling, then the dirt below must be wet. This sets up a clear way the two things go together. Next, we see the second idea tells us that the ground is not wet. If the ground were wet, rain might have caused it, but since the ground is dry, the thing that would make it wet cannot be happening. So this means the last idea, that it is not raining, follows for sure from the first two ideas because the end part is not true, so the start part is not true. follows

english_query: why some deals hold together and others fall apart
ugf_response: First, we look at a time when two people agree to do something for each other. One person gives a thing and the other person gives money or work. This is a promise. The hard question is why some of these promises last for a long time and why others break very quickly. We must think about what holds the people together. One answer is that both people trust each other. If they believe the other person will do their part, they feel safe. They do not worry about being hurt or losing what they have. This trust makes the promise strong. Another answer is that there is a way to make someone pay if they do not do their part. If a person knows they will be in trouble if they break the promise, they will try to keep it. This fear of trouble can hold the promise together. But sometimes, people do not trust each other. They think the other person might take the good part and leave them with nothing. If this feeling is strong, the promise breaks before it even starts. Also, if the thing they are giving to one another changes in how good it is, the promise might break. If one person feels they are getting less than they should, they may stop doing their part. This shows that promises need trust or strong ways to keep people doing what they said to stay together. Without these things, the promise is not strong and can break when things get hard.

english_query: how paying close attention to what someone needs is a kind of good
ugf_response:
Person number one: Why do you think it is good to look with great care at what a person needs?

Person number two: It is good because when you see what someone really wants or needs, you can act in a way that makes their life better. It is a way to show you care about them.

Person number one: But how does that make the world a better place?

Person number two: When we all do this, we stop acting only for the person we are. We start to see the other people around us. This makes the group of people stronger and more happy.

Person number one: Is it possible to look with too much care? Could it be bad to think only about what they need?

Person number two: Yes, that can happen. If you only think about what they need and forget to think about what you need, you might become too tired or lose your own way.

Person number one: So, it is a way of being good, but we must also be careful.

Person number two: That is right. The good part comes from the act of seeing and helping, but we must keep our own hearts well too.

english_query: Either the cake is chocolate or the cake is vanilla. The cake is not chocolate. Therefore, the cake is vanilla. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says the sweet food is either the brown kind or the white kind. This means one of these two things must be true. Next, we look at the second idea. It tells us that the sweet food is not the brown kind. This takes away the first choice. If the sweet food cannot be the brown kind, and it must be either the brown kind or the white kind, then there is only one choice left. That last choice is the white kind. So, if we believe the first two ideas are true, we must also believe the last idea is true. We can think of a story where this happens. I go to a shop. The seller says the sweet food is the brown kind or the white kind. I see the sweet food and know it is not the brown kind. For this reason, I know it is the white kind. There is no other way for the first two ideas to be true and the last idea to be wrong. So the last idea follows for sure. follows

english_query: how to build fair rules if you did not know your place in the world
ugf_response:
The first idea that the case says is true is that a human can never be sure where they belong in the big picture of life. It says that you may not know if you are rich or poor, not strong or strong, high or low, or what group you will end up in. Because of that, the case says we have no clear picture of our own spot when we try to think about what is good for everyone.

From that, the second idea that the case says should follow is that the thing we tell all people to do must not need to know any spot of a human. The case says that the best way to keep things good for all is to build a system that acts the same toward each human, no matter what they might be. It says we should try to set up a plan that gives each human the same chance to be helped or to be asked to follow an order, and that the plan should not give extra help to some just because we think they are in a certain place. In short, the case says that if we do not know the spot of each human, the only safe way is to use an order that does not look at that spot at all.

The third idea looks at whether this way of thinking is good. One good part is that it tries to stop the hurt that can happen when an order is made for a group that the maker does not belong to. By not looking at spot, the order cannot easily pick one group over another, which can keep many humans from feeling left out. Another good part is that it can be simple to follow, because everyone can see the same order and know that it does not change for different humans.

But there are also things that make this thinking hard to use well. First, an order that does not look at spot may miss the fact that some humans really do need more help because they start from a lower place. If the order acts the same toward everyone, it can end up keeping the space between humans who have a lot and those who have very little, because those who already have a lot get the same help as those who have very little. Second, we may not be able to know if an order is really good for all unless we can see how it works for each kind of human. Without that look, we might think an order is good while it actually hurts some groups. Finally, the case does not say how to take care of the fact that we can sometimes learn a little about the spot of a human, even if we never know it all the way. Ignoring all that information may throw away a thing we use that could make the order better for those who need it most.

All in all, the case gives a clear picture of a true fact – we do not know our the very same spot – and it draws a clear line from that fact to a plan for making an order that does not use that not known. The thinking is strong in its want to stop hurt that comes from guessing about other humans’ places, but it may be too simple when it comes to actually helping a world where humans start from many different places. A better way might be to use an order that mostly does not look at spot, but that also has a small part that can give extra help when we see that someone is clearly starting from a lower place. This would keep the good part of the idea while fixing the part that can leave some humans behind.

english_query: Either the cake is chocolate or the cake is vanilla. The cake is chocolate. Therefore, the cake is not vanilla. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we see the first idea says the sweet food is either the brown kind or the white kind. Then, the second idea says the sweet food is the brown kind. Since it is the brown kind, it cannot be the white kind. This is because the first idea says it must be one or the other. So, the last idea that the sweet food is not the white kind follows for sure. follows

english_query: Present the full success/failure breakdown and compare it to other available contractors. Highlight that the overall risk of switching to a lower‑performing crew is greater than the occasional mishap.
ugf_response: First, we look at the count of good jobs and bad jobs done by the workers we use now. We see they do most things right, even if a few things go wrong. Then, we look at other workers who ask for less money. Their count shows more bad things happen and fewer good things happen. Some might say we should try the new workers because the bad things our old team does are bad. But we must think about the big picture. If we change to a group that fails more often, we will have many more problems, not just a few. The pain of many small bad things from a bad group is worse than the pain of one bad thing from a good group. So, keeping the group that does the job right most of the time is the safer choice. The workers we use now are better because their good work is more than their few bad things, while changing to a worse group brings more trouble than it saves.

english_query: But now what can we call him-what is the thing he is good at.
ugf_response: Oh close friend, there are many things persons are good at which come from trying, and they start from what persons have seen, because seeing things makes persons' days go by what they are good at, and not seeing things makes them go by chance, and different persons are good at different things, and the best persons are good at the best things. And our friend the well known teacher of speaking is one of the best, and the thing in which he is good is the most good.

english_query: why different situations need different kinds of good character
ugf_response:
To be a good person is not the same thing in every moment. You might think that being good means doing one thing all the time. But life is not one single thing. Life changes. Because life changes, the way you act to do the right thing must also change.

First, think about how you act with your friends. When you are with people you love, being good might mean being kind and soft. You might listen to them and make them feel happy. You might show that you care about their feelings. In this situation, being too hard or too strong might make things bad.

Second, think about a situation where you must lead a group of people to do a hard job. If you are too soft, the work might not get done. The people might not do what they must do to stay safe or to finish the work that was set for them. In this case, being good means being strong and making sure everyone follows the way that is needed. If you were only soft, you would not be doing the right thing for the group.

Third, think about a situation where you must tell the truth about something bad that someone did. If you are too kind to the person who did the bad thing, you might hide what they did. That would not be good. To be good here, you must have the power to not be afraid and tell what is true, even if it hurts someone.

So, we see that being good is not a single thing that stays the same. It is more like a set of ways to act. You must look at what is happening around you. You must see who is there and what the situation needs. A good person is someone who can see what the moment needs and then acts in that way. Being good means knowing when to be soft and when to be hard, when to be quiet and when to speak, and when to stay still and when to move. If you try to use only one way to act, you will not be able to do what is right in every part of your life.

english_query: Then clearly, old teacher, you would say that you did not even know if the big leader was a happy man?
ugf_response: And I would speak the true words; for I do not know how he is with learning and doing right.

english_query: In the same big way, we might also have right thoughts about a thing with wheels; but the one who can say what it really is by counting the hundred boards adds a clear reason to right thoughts, and instead of just thoughts has a way of doing things and knowing of the way things are of a thing with wheels, because he gets the whole thing through the small parts.
ugf_response: And do you not agree with that way of seeing things, old teacher?

english_query: why some things you must never do to another person no matter what
ugf_response: First, we must think about why we act well toward other people. We think about how we want other people to act toward us. If we do not want someone to hurt us or take our things, we must not do those things to them. Second, we must think about the way people feel. Every person has a mind that can feel pain or a feeling of being not happy. If we do something to make someone feel great pain, we are doing something that is not good. Third, we can see that if everyone did bad things to everyone else, the world would be a place of fear and no one could live in a way that is quiet and good. If we want to live in a world where we are safe, we must all agree to not do certain bad things. The thing after the third thing, we can see that some things are so bad that they break the way we live together. For one thing, taking a life or making someone work for another person without their choice is so bad that it makes it so people cannot be free or happy. The thing after the thing after the third thing, we can say that because we are all the same kind of living thing with the same need to be safe and happy, we must have some things that we never do. We do these things because if we do not, we end the very thing that makes us able to live together as people.

english_query: how doing good things over and over makes you into a good person
ugf_response:
Person 1: Why does doing good things many times change who we are?  
Person 2: When you do a good thing, you feel a small warm feeling inside. If you do that many times, that feeling grows.  
Person 1: Is that feeling what makes us a good person?  
Person 2: Yes. The more you act with care for others, the more your mind and feelings learn to act that way.  
Person 1: So it is like a way that you do many times that builds a new kind of the person you are?  
Person 2: Exactly. Each good act is a step that adds to the way you act as a person.  
Person 1: Can someone stop being a good person if they stop doing good things?  
Person 2: If they stop, the warm feeling may fade, and the way they act may change back toward the old.  
Person 1: So we need to keep doing good things to stay good?  
Person 2: Right. Keep the act of doing it many times, and the good you will stay strong.

english_query: And now, as the old teacher says, read my idea: color is a thing that comes from shape, like what we see, and can be felt.
ugf_response: That, the old teacher, seems to me be a good answer.

english_query: The Ultimatum Game is a powerful diagnostic for real‑world strategic interaction because it forces players to confront the tension between material self‑interest and normative concerns.
ugf_response: First, we look at the game where one person gives money to another. The second person can say yes or no. If they say no, nobody gets anything. This shows how people act when money and right ways of acting come together. Some might think people only care about getting the most money. But in the real world, people often say no to bad offers even if it means they get nothing. This proves that how we feel about being shown good ways matters just as much as the money itself. So the game is a good way to see this hidden fight inside our heads between wanting things and wanting to do what is right. The game is a strong way to see truth because it shows that people will throw away free money to stop bad ways of acting, proving that feelings about right and wrong are just as important as personal money.

english_query: The great old church teacher says that when we look for the three-in-one in our mind, we look in the whole mind, not making a break between thinking about now and thinking about forever. So the mark of the three-in-one is in the mind, even for things of now.
ugf_response: We can see a kind of three-in-one in the whole mind, but not by needing a third thing other than thinking about now and thinking about forever, as he says. But in the part of thought that is about now, even if a three-in-one is there, the mark of God is not seen there, because knowing things of now is added to the mind. Also, the ways we know things of now are not always there; sometimes they are working, sometimes only in memory. This is true for trust, which comes for this life; in the next life, trust will end, only the memory of it will stay.

english_query: how to build your own set of rules for making hard choices
ugf_response:
The person wants to tell us how to make a set of ways to pick what to do when things are hard. The first idea is that we must have a way to decide what is right and what is wrong when we cannot know the best way to act. The second idea is that we can make this way by our own hands by looking at what things do. The third idea is that we should look at how our choices change the world and how they touch the people around us.

The person thinks that if we look at the things that happen after we do something, we can find the best path. They think that if doing something makes more good things happen for more people, then that thing is the right one to do. They believe that by using this way of thinking, we can make hard choices without being lost or making bad choices that hurt people.

We must look at if this way of thinking is good. The first part of the thinking is good because it looks at the real world and what actually happens. It is good to care about the good things that come from our ways of doing things. However, the thinking has a problem. The second part of the problem is that it is very hard to know what will happen in the future. We might think a way of doing something is good, but it might cause a lot of hurt later. The third part of the problem is that it is hard to count how much good or hurt is happening. One person might feel very good while another person feels very bad, and it is not easy to say which feeling is more important. Because of these things, the way of thinking might not always lead us to the right answer.

english_query: how a story about one person does not tell us about everyone
ugf_response:
When we hear a story about one person we may feel that we see a little bit of what many people are like. The story can show a time when that one person felt sad, or felt fear and still kept going, or had to work hard. It can also show how that one person met a problem and tried to fix it. When we hear that, our mind may jump to think that the same kind of feeling or thing they did might be true for a lot of other people. That jump is the hard question we have to think about.

The hard question is whether a story about one person can give us a good picture of what all people in a group think, feel, or do. Some people say that a single story can be a small sign of what many people are like. They point out that many people share the same kind of life, the same kind of need, and the same kind of chance to meet the same kind of problem. They think that if one person can show a way to act, then many others might act the same way because they live in the same world and have the same kind of chance to learn.

Other people say that a single story cannot tell us about the whole group. They say that each person is a one of a kind set of many parts put together – family, body state, place, and chance – and that a single story may only show a special case. They tell about hurt that we might think we know a lot about many people when we only know a little about one, and that this can lead us to think something that is not true about the rest. They also note that some groups have many ways they are not the same, and a story that fits one person may not fit another who lives in a different place or who has a different set of needs.

Why do the two sides think in another way? The first side often feels that the world has ways that repeat, and that a story can show a way that repeats. They may have seen many times that one kind of event leads to what happens for many. The second side often feels that the world also has many little changes that can change what happens, and that a single story can hide those changes. They may have seen times when a story seemed true for one person but was wrong for another, and they tell about hurt that using one story for all can hide those small but important changes.

In the end, the question stays open. We can take the story of one person and look for signs that might fit a larger group, but we also need to keep an eye on the many ways people can be not the same. We may need to ask more stories, ask more people, and keep checking if the signs still fit. In that way we can try to make a picture that is not only from one story, but from many small pieces that together make a better view of the whole.

english_query: Some answer, the old teacher, must be long; but I will try to make them as short as I can, because part of my work is that I can be as short as any one.
ugf_response: That is what we want, the well known teacher of speaking; show the short way now, and the long way some other time.

english_query: why everyone doing what is best for them can make things worse for all
ugf_response:
Person number one: I want to know something. If every person tries to do what is best for them, why does that make life bad for everyone else?

Person number two: It happens because what is good for one person can take things away from other people. If many people all want the same thing at the same time, there will not be enough for everyone.

Person number one: Can you tell me more about that? How does that work in real life?

Person number two: Think about a group of people near a small place where water sits on the ground. If every person wants to take as much water as they can to make their own garden grow, the water will go away. Soon, there is no water left for anyone. Each person thought they were doing the right thing for their own garden, but they made the whole place dry.

Person number one: So, if I think only about my own needs, I might hurt the group without meaning to?

Person number two: Yes. That is the problem. When people only look at what they want, they do not see how the things they do touch the things that everyone needs to live well. If everyone acts this way, the things that keep us all safe and happy will break.

english_query: I hope that he may; but I rather fear, old teacher, that the other way will turn out to be true. My thought is that in hitting you he is simply trying to hit the thing that holds up the land. But in what way does he say that you make the young bad?
ugf_response: He brings a strange thing to say against me, which at first hearing makes people surprised: he says that I am a writer of stories about gods, and that I make new gods and say the old ones are not there; this is the reason for his saying I did wrong.

english_query: the problem of using what was to guess what will be
ugf_response:
Person number one: I want to know about the problem with using what happened before to guess what will happen next.

Person number two: The problem is that the world is always changing. What was true in the past may not be true in the future.

Person number one: Why can we not just look at the past to see what things do?

Person number two: You can look, but you cannot see things that have never happened before. If a new thing comes into the world, the old ways of looking at it will not work.

Person number one: Is it because the things that happen are not always the same?

Person number two: Yes. Sometimes a small change in one thing can make a huge change in everything else. The old ways do not show you how these new changes will move.

Person number one: So, if we use the past to make a guess, can we be wrong?

Person number two: We can be very wrong. We might think we see a way that things go, but we are only seeing the way they went before. We are not seeing the way they are going now.

english_query: why everyone doing what is best for them can make things worse for all
ugf_response:
Person one: I do not get it. If every person does what is good for them, why would things go bad for everyone?

Person two: It is a hard thing to see. Think about a group of people who all want more money. Each person tries to get as much as they can for themselves.

Person one: But if they all have more money, does that not make the whole group better?

Person two: Not always. If everyone tries to take more than their share, the things they want might run out. Or, they might do things that hurt others just to get ahead. When everyone thinks only of their own good, they stop thinking about the good of the whole group.

Person one: So, if I only care about me, I might do something that hurts you, and then you do something to hurt me back?

Person two: Yes. That is what happens. If everyone acts only for themselves, the things that keep us all safe and happy can break. The things that help us all stay together fall into pieces because no one is looking after them. Everyone is too busy looking after only their own small part.

english_query: Also, there is the story sense, which is not one of those four.
ugf_response: The story sense is inside the real sense, because words show things in a true way and in a picture way. The picture itself is not the real sense, but what the picture shows is. When the book to do with god talks about the arm of the one who makes all, the real sense is not that the one who makes all has a body part, but what that part shows, which is power to do. So it is clear that nothing wrong can ever be under the real sense of the book to do with god.

english_query: A single concave utility function predicts risk aversion in both domains; a single convex function predicts risk seeking in both. Neither can generate the observed flip, so the MEU model with a consistent utility curve is insufficient.
ugf_response: First we see that one idea that has a down side says we are careful about bad thing in both places. Then we see that one idea that has an up side says we are not careful about bad thing in both places. The real world shows that people are careful in one place but not careful in the other. That means the thought that we use one same idea for all places cannot give the change we see. Someone might say that maybe the same idea can work if we add extra parts or look at other things. But even with extra parts the simple one idea shape still cannot be both down side and up side at the same time. So the simple one idea is not enough to explain the change we see. The biggest answer is that we need a different many ideas group to go with the things we see. The simple one idea cannot explain the change, so we need a different many ideas group.

english_query: why what you already believe changes how you see new things
ugf_response:
Think about how you see the world. You have many things that you think are true in your mind. These things are like a set of glasses that you always wear. Because you wear these glasses, you do not see the world as it is. Instead, you see the world through what you already know and what you already believe.

First, let us look at how your mind works when it sees something new. When a new thing comes to you, your mind does not start from nothing. Instead, it looks at the new thing and tries to put it into a place that you already have in your mind. If the new thing fits with what you already believe, your mind says, yes, this makes sense. It feels good because it does not change what you thought before.

Second, if the new thing does not fit with what you believe, your mind feels a kind of pain or bad feeling. This is because the new thing says that what you thought was true might not be true. This makes your mind feel as if it is in a place where bad things might happen. To stop this bad feeling, your mind will try to change how it sees the new thing. It might say the new thing is wrong. It might say the new thing is not important. It might even say the person who brought the new thing is not telling the truth.

Third, this means that you are not seeing the world in a way that is the very same for everyone. Two people can look at the very same thing and see two different things. One person sees something that fits their mind, so they think it is true. The other person sees something that does not fit their mind, so they think it is not true.

In the end, what you believe acts like a way to sort things. It helps you decide what is good and what is bad, or what is true and what is not true. But because of this, it is very hard to see the real world without letting your old thoughts change what you see. To see better, you must try to take off your glasses and look at things without thinking about what you already know.

english_query: If the fire has fuel, then the fire keeps burning. The fire keeps burning. Therefore, the fire has fuel. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea: if the fire has food for it, then the fire keeps going. This tells us what happens when the food is there. Then, we see the second idea: the fire is keeping going. We want to know if this means the food must be there. But wait, the first idea does not say that food is the only way for the fire to keep going. There could be other reasons for the fire to stay lit. So, just because the fire is keeping going, we cannot be sure that food is the cause. The last idea does not follow for sure. does not follow

english_query: Very true, old teacher.
ugf_response: Then being good to the gods is a way that the gods and people use to do things with each other?

english_query: Either she will take the train or she will take the bus. She will not take the train. Therefore, she will take the bus. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says that one of two things must happen. The first thing is that she goes by train. The second thing is that she goes by bus. The word 'or' here means she must pick one. Next, we look at the second idea. It tells us that she will not take the train. This removes the first choice. Since the first idea said she must take the train or the bus, and we now know she is not taking the train, there is only one choice left. That choice is the bus. So, if she is not on the train, she must be on the bus. We can imagine a story where someone says this. If I say I will eat a red thing or a green thing, and then I show you that I am not eating the red thing, you know I must be eating the green thing. The same is true here. The last idea says she will take the bus. This fits with what we know. So, the last idea follows for sure from the first two ideas. follows

english_query: It seems there are not many who in god. For a who is the one true thing of a thinking kind. So if there are many who in god, there must be many true things; and this looks wrong.
ugf_response: The word who has true thing in it, not as what it is to be, but as the one thing made clear by saying one. To show this true thing, old teachers use a different word. So we say three who, and they say three of that other word. We do not say three true things, for fear people think we mean three what-it-is-to-be, because the word true thing can mean two things.

english_query: why we should not accept something just because many people believe it
ugf_response:
Many people think that if a great many people say something is true, then it must be true. They believe that if most people in a room say the sky is green, then the sky is green. This way of thinking feels safe. It feels like if you go with the big group, you will be right and you will not be alone. This is a way to find what is true by looking at what everyone else thinks.

But there is a big problem with this way of thinking. The hard question is this: can a big group of people be wrong about something? We know that they can. In the past, many people believed that the earth was the center of everything and that nothing moved around it. They were a big group, but they were wrong. If we only believe what the big group says, we might never find the true way things are. We might stay stuck in a wrong way of thinking just because it is what everyone else says.

Some people say we should always look at what the big group says. They think this is a good way to live because it keeps things the same and keeps people together. They say that if we do not follow the group, we will do many things that are not right which the group has already seen and fixed. To them, the group is like a large eye that sees more than one person can see.

Other people say we must not trust the big group too much. They think we must look at the things themselves to see if they are true. They say that truth does not care how many people believe it. If one person sees a thing that is true, and a number of people so large it is hard to count say it is not true, the one person is still right. These people believe we must use our own eyes and our own minds to find what is real, even if it makes us stand alone. They think that if we only follow the crowd, we will never learn anything new or find a better way to live.

english_query: why being good at being a person is like being good at anything else
ugf_response:
To be good at being a person means to know how to live well with other people and how to take care of your own mind and body. Many people think this is something that just happens as you grow up. They think it is different from learning how to play a song on a box of wood and thin metal lines or learning how to build a house. But this is not true. Being good at being a person is just like being good at any other thing that you want to do well.

First, you must think about how we learn to do things. When you want to learn to play a song, you do not just know it at once. You must try it many times. You will do it wrong many times. You will make sounds that are not good. But each time you try, your hands and your mind learn a little bit more. This is how you get better.

Being a person is the same way. You must learn how to speak to others without making them feel bad. You must learn how to stay calm when things go wrong. You must learn how to know what you want. You will not do these things right the first time. You will say things that hurt people. You will feel angry when you should not. You will feel lost. But these are the ways you learn. Each time you do something wrong, you can look at what happened and try to do it better the next time.

Second, you must have a way to see if you are doing well. When you build a house, you can look at the walls. If the walls are not straight, you know you have not done a good job. When you are learning to be a person, you must look at your own heart and your own thoughts. You must look at how other people act when they are around you. If people feel happy and safe when they are with you, you are doing well. If you feel heavy and sad inside, you might need to change how you live.

Third, you must put in the work. You cannot get good at a thing by only thinking about it. You must do it. You cannot get good at being a person by only reading books about it. You must go out and talk to people. You must go out and face the things that make you afraid. You must do the hard work of changing your ways.

In the end, being a person is a thing you learn to do well through work. It is a way of living that you build one day at a time. It takes time, it takes many tries, and it takes a way to see if you are moving in the right way. If you act as if it is a thing you want to become very good at, you will grow.

english_query: And yet, young man, I cannot help thinking that the other was better; and I am sure that you would think the same, if you would only stay and learn the hidden ways, and were not forced, as you said the day before, to go away before the hidden ways.
ugf_response: But I will stay, old teacher, if you will give me many such answers.

english_query: I agree; take me where you want, for I know that you are like the thing that decides what happens; no one can get away from any point you make for them. But I do not want to go further than you say.
ugf_response: One time is enough; and now be very careful that we do not again by chance put us in the way of being told we are talking like little kids.

english_query: And what would you say of the way we take in things, like seeing and hearing, or any other way of taking in? Is there any stopping in the act of seeing and hearing?
ugf_response: Certainly not, if all things are moving.

english_query: And does being good to the sky powers, which has been said to be the way of caring for the sky powers, help them or make them better? Would you say that when you do a good thing for the sky powers you make any of them better?
ugf_response: No, no; that was certainly not what I meant.

english_query: If he turns on the light, then the room is bright. The room is not bright. Therefore, he does not turn on the light. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says that if a man turns on the light, the room will be bright. This is a clear if-then tie. The if part is turning on the light. The then part is the room being bright. Next, we look at the second idea. It tells us that the room is not bright. This means the then part did not happen. Now we need to see if the last idea follows. The last idea says the man does not turn on the light. Let us think about this. If turning on the light always makes the room bright, and the room is not bright, then the light could not have been turned on. If he had turned it on, the room would be bright. Since the room is not bright, he must not have turned it on. We can try to find a story where the first two ideas are true but the last one is not. Imagine the man turns on the light. Then the room must be bright. But our second idea says the room is not bright. So this story cannot happen. There is no way for him to turn on the light and have the room not be bright, given the first idea. So, if the room is not bright, he did not turn on the light. The last idea fits very well with the first two. It follows for sure. follows

english_query: the problem of spending more just because you already spent a lot
ugf_response:
Imagine you go to a place to buy things. You start by buying one small thing. Then you buy a second thing. Now, you have spent some of your money. You look at how much money you have left. You think to yourself, I have already spent a lot of money. Because I have already spent this much, I feel like I must keep spending more. I feel like I should buy more things to make the money you already gave away seem good.

This is a bad way to think. To see why, we must look at the money you have left in your hand. That money is all that matters for the next choice you make. The money you already gave away is gone. You cannot get it back. It does not change how much your next choice will help you or how much it will hurt you.

Let us look at a way to think about this. Suppose you pay to go see a show. After you sit down, you see that the show is very bad. It makes you feel sad or angry. You might think, I should stay because I already paid for the way into the place. But if you stay, you are losing two things. First, you lose the money you paid. Second, you lose the time you are sitting there feeling bad. If you leave, you only lose the money. You save your time.

The wrong way of thinking happens when people think the money they spent in the past should change what they do now. They think they must keep going to make the first spend good. But the first spend is finished. It is a thing of the past. When you decide what to do next, you should only look at what you have now and what will happen next. You should not let the money that is already gone tell you how to act. If you do this, you will often spend even more money and even more time on things that do not make you happy.

english_query: Also, what happens shows only its own start. But the start of living things is part of the same kind, and not part of the ways we call the three together different and count them. So in a living thing we find a sign not of the three together but of one true kind.
ugf_response: The ways the three together move are also in some way the start and kind of making things; as we see from the earlier.

english_query: If it is raining, then the ground is wet. It is not raining. Therefore, the ground is not wet. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says that if rain is falling, then the dirt below is wet. This tells us what happens when it is raining, but it does not say what happens when it is not raining. The second idea tells us that it is not raining right now. We know rain makes the ground wet, but many other things can make the ground wet too, like a man with a watering can or a broken water line. So, just because it is not raining, we cannot be sure the ground is dry. The last idea says the ground is not wet, but this does not follow for sure because the ground could be wet for another reason. does not follow

english_query: "Listen up, landlubber! When the sky darkens we either batten down the hatches or we sit on our boots. Show me which choice cuts the biggest tide, and tell me why a bribe for rum ain't as simple as it looks."
ugf_response: First, we look at the bad sky. We must close the holes in the boat to keep water out. If we do not do this, the boat will fill with water and go down under the sea. This is bad for us. So, closing the holes is the right thing to do. Next, we think about giving money for drink. This is not a good plan. If we give drink, the men might stop working. They might also want more drink every time. This makes it hard to get them to do the work we need. It makes them expect free things. So, it is better to ask them to work because it is their job, not because we give them drink. We should close the holes in the boat to stay safe. We should not give drink to make men work because they might stop helping us.

english_query: It seems that the life parts of animals that do not think stand on their own. For man is in the same group as other animals; and, as we just showed, the life part of man stands on its own. So the life parts of other animals stand on their own.
ugf_response: Although man is in the same group as other animals, he is of a different kind. The change in kind comes from the change in what makes it what it is; and not every change in what makes it what it is means a change in group.

english_query: If he turns on the light, then the room is bright. The room is bright. Therefore, he turns on the light. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says that if a man turns on the light, then the room becomes bright. This sets up a tie between two things. The first part is the man turning on the light. The second part is the room being bright. Then, we look at the next idea. It tells us that the room is bright. We know the second part of our tie is true. But does this mean the first part must be true? Not for sure. There are many ways for a room to be bright. For one thing, the sun could be sending light through a window. Or someone else could have turned on a different light. So, just because the room is bright, we cannot be sure that the man turned on the light. We can think of a time when the room is bright because of the sun, but the man did not touch the thing to turn on the light. In this case, the first two ideas are true, but the last idea is not. So, the last idea does not follow for sure from the earlier ones. does not follow

ugf_response: Why not, old teacher, if they let me, as I think you will, because of my age and how hard it is for me to move; let some young person who can move easy try to fall with you, and do not pull me into the place for moving.

english_query: If the alarm rang, then she woke up. The alarm rang. Therefore, she woke up. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we see the first idea says if the loud noise maker went off, then she woke up. Second, the next idea says the loud noise maker did go off. Third, because the first part of the if-then thought is true, the second part must be true too. So, it is sure that she woke up. follows

english_query: Because the pure equilibria are asymmetric, the parents must negotiate who will take the ‘Hawk’ role. In families, tacit rules such as “the parent who finished work later gets the night shift” often resolve this, turning the mixed equilibrium into a stable routine.
ugf_response: First, we see that two people need to pick different jobs to work well, like one being loud and the other quiet. If they do not talk, they might pick the same job and fail. The idea says families use quiet ways, like who gets home last, to settle this. This helps because it stops fighting and gives a clear plan. Someone might say this is bad because people could change their minds, but in real life, these quiet ways help families run well every day. So, the strong point is that these simple ways turn a hard choice into a good way of doing things that works for everyone. Families use quiet ways to decide who does what, which stops fighting and makes life good. This shows how simple ways help people work together without talking much.

english_query: If it is raining, then the ground is wet. If the ground is wet, then the door can be opened from outside. Therefore, if it is raining, then the door can be opened from outside. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says that if rain is falling, the ground gets wet. This tells us rain brings wet ground. Next, we look at the second idea. It says that if the ground is wet, the door can be opened from the outside. This tells us wet ground brings open door. Now we want to see if rain leads to the door being able to open. If rain makes the ground wet, and wet ground lets the door open, then rain must let the door open. The steps hold together. Rain leads to wet ground. Wet ground leads to open door. So rain leads to open door. We can imagine a day. It is raining. The ground becomes wet. Because the ground is wet, the door can be opened. The last idea says if it is raining, the door can be opened. This fits our steps. There is no missing part in the steps. The last idea follows for sure from the first two ideas. follows

english_query: Very well; do so if you will.
ugf_response: Then now, the bright young one, look at the thing in a new way: you said that what someone knows is what they feel?

english_query: how we build a picture of the world from small pieces of what we see
ugf_response:
The person is talking about how we see things. The first idea is that we do not see the whole world at once. Instead, we see small bits of things. These small bits are like tiny pieces of a big picture. The second idea is that our minds take these tiny pieces and put them together. This is how we make a picture in our heads of what is around us.

The person thinks that if we have these small pieces, we can know what the whole thing looks like. They think that by looking at many small pieces, we can build a big and true picture of the world. They believe that the small pieces are the starting point for all our knowing.

We must look at if this way of thinking is good. The thinking has a good part. It is true that our eyes see small bits of light and color. It is also true that our minds must work to make sense of those bits. However, the thinking might have a bad part. The way we put pieces together might not be the very same as how the world is. Our minds might make a picture that is not true because we are only using small pieces. We might miss the big picture because we are only looking at the tiny bits. We might also put the pieces together in a way that makes a picture that is not real. So, while the start is true, the end might not be.

english_query: why sometimes a good enough answer is better than the best answer
ugf_response:
The person says that sometimes the best answer is not the best choice to make. The first idea they give is that finding the very best answer takes a long time and a lot of work. The second idea is that while you are looking for that best answer, things might change or you might lose the chance to do something. The third idea is that the time and the work you use to find the best answer might be more than the small extra good thing you get from it.

From these ideas, the person says that an answer that is good enough is often the better choice. They think that if you pick an answer that is good enough, you can act quickly and save your work and your time. This way, you can use your work for other things instead of spending it all on one thing.

To see if this thinking is good, we must look at how the pieces fit together. The thinking is good if the things they say are true. If it is true that the best answer takes too much time, and if it is true that time and work are not something you have forever, then their way of thinking makes sense. However, if the thing you are doing is very important and a small thing done wrong will lead to a big hurt, then the best answer is always the only answer. The thinking is good for many things, but it might not be good for everything.

english_query: how to tell when what someone says gives us a good reason to believe it
ugf_response:
When someone tells you something is true, you must decide if you should believe them. To do this, you should look at a few things. First, you should look at the person who is speaking. Do they know a lot about what they are saying? Have they told you things that were true before? If they are a person who knows much and tells the truth, you might believe them more. If they often say things that are not true, you should be careful.

Second, you should look at the things they use to show that what they say is true. If they say something is true because they saw it with their own eyes, that is a strong way to show it. If they say it because they heard it from someone else, it might be less strong. You must ask if the things they use to show the truth are good or if they are just guesses.

Third, you should look at how well their story fits with what you already know is true. If what they say goes against everything else you know to be true, you should ask for more things that show it is true. If their story fits well with many other true things, it is a thing that has a high chance of being true.

The thing after the third thing, you should look to see if they are trying to make you believe something for a reason that is not about the truth. Sometimes people want you to believe something so they can get something for themselves. If they want you to believe something so they can win or get money, you must be very careful.

Finally, you should see if their story stays the same when you ask more questions. If you ask them about the small parts of their story and the parts do not fit together, then their story is not true. A good story should stay strong even when you look at it with a very deep eye. If you check all these things and the story is still strong, then you have a good reason to believe it.

english_query: Exactly; and I want you to think about if this means that the group of one hundred twenty is thought to be a group of one hundred ten?
ugf_response: Yes, that seems to be so.

english_query: If she studies for the test, then she passes the test. She passes the test. Therefore, she studies for the test. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says that if she does the work of learning, then the next thing is that she does well on the check of her knowing. This is a way of saying what happens when she learns. Then we look at the second idea. It tells us that she does well on the check of her knowing. We know this part is true. Now we need to see if the last idea follows. The last idea says that she must have done the work of learning. But wait, the first idea only tells us what happens if she learns. It does not say that learning is the only way to do well. Maybe she did well because she was very bright. Maybe she did well because the check of her knowing was easy. Maybe someone else helped her. We can think of a small story. In this story, she does not do the work of learning at all. But she still does well on the check of her knowing because she already knew the answers. In this story, the first idea is still true, because it only talks about what happens if she learns. It does not say anything about what happens if she does not learn. The second idea is also true, because she does do well. But the last idea is wrong, because she did not do the work of learning. Since we can have a story where the first two ideas are true but the last idea is not, the last idea does not follow for sure from the first two. does not follow

ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says that if the hot food has the white stuff, then it will have a strong good way of hitting the tongue. Next, we look at the second idea. It tells us that the hot food has no strong way of hitting the tongue. We know that no strong way is not a strong good way. So, the hot food does not have that strong good way. Now we ask if this means the hot food has no white stuff. The first idea only tells us what happens when the white stuff is there. It does not tell us what happens when the white stuff is not there. Maybe the hot food has the white stuff but also has something else that makes it feel flat on the tongue. Or maybe the person eating it cannot feel things well. We can imagine a story where the hot food has the white stuff, but it is too hot to eat, making it feel flat instead of strong. In this story, the first two ideas are true, but the last idea is not true. Because we can think of a way for the first two ideas to be true while the last idea is not true, the last idea does not follow for sure from the earlier ones. does not follow

english_query: old teacher, you are right.

english_query: how a group can agree on rules that are good for everyone
ugf_response: First, we must see that every person in a group wants things to go well for themselves. Second, we see that what is good for one person might be bad for another person. Third, we must find a way to make everyone feel that the things they must do are right and not wrong. To do this, the people must sit together and talk about what they want. They must tell each other what they need and what they fear. Then, they can look for things that all people want. For one such thing, everyone wants to be safe and everyone wants to have enough to eat. Once they find these things, they can make a set of ways to act that keep these needs for all. These ways must be the same for everyone, so no one gets more than another for no reason. If everyone sees that the ways are the same and that the ways keep everyone safe, they will agree to follow them. Finally, the group must make sure that if someone does not follow the ways, there is a way to fix the bad thing that happened without hurting people more than they need to be hurt.

ugf_response: First we see a line that says if he turn on the light then the room is bright. That means when the first thing (he turn on light) happens the second thing (room bright) will happen. english_query: Relying on the Barnum effect convinces people that a vague, non‑empirical source (like a fish‑scale reading) provides real insight. This reinforces belief in pseudoscientific practices and can lead to poor decisions based on imagined personal truths rather than evidence.
ugf_response: First, we notice a way our minds work. We often think a wide idea is made just for us. This is a big thing because it can make us believe in things that are not true. For one thing, if someone says you are kind but also can be mean, we might say yes. This fits many people. Then, we see how this helps people believe in things that are not real ways to know the future. Things like reading lines on a hand or looking at fish parts are not real ways to know what will happen. They use soft words that mean many things. When a person sees these words, they feel it is special for them. This makes them trust the person giving the words. But this trust is wrong. It is not built on real facts. If people believe this, they might do bad things. They might not go to a doctor because they think a wrong reading said they are fine. This is bad for their body. Someone might say that feeling good is good. But feeling good about a lie is not safe. It can hurt you. So, we must be careful. We should look for real signs. We should not trust words that fit everyone. This helps us make good choices. We need to know what is real to live well. The way we think makes us trust wide ideas as if they are special. This leads to bad choices, so we must look for real facts instead of soft words.

english_query: What do you mean, old teacher?
ugf_response: Maybe nothing. But I will try to show what I think I mean: When you talk about the work of making shoes, you mean the way of making shoes?

english_query: Also, a choose shows a different. But the one who makes all wants all people to be safe. So the first choose that makes people go to always be safe has no choose.
ugf_response: The one who makes all wants all people to be safe by his first want, which is a want that is not just a simple want but a want that also says about other things; and not by his later want, which is a want that is just a simple want.

english_query: If the door is unlocked, then the door can be opened from outside. The door is unlocked. Therefore, the door can be opened from outside. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea given. It says that if the door is not locked, then a person can open it from the outside. This sets up a clear path. If the first part is true, the second part must be true. Next, we look at the second idea. It tells us that the door is not locked. This is the same as the first part of our if-then idea. Since the first part is true, the second part has to be true too. We do not need to guess. The path is clear. The door is not locked, so it can be opened from the outside. Someone who agrees with the first two ideas must agree with the last one. There is no other way to see it. The last idea follows for sure from the earlier ones. follows

english_query: Also, the better a living thing is, the more things it does inside; like a man who can think and want, which other animals cannot. But god is much better than any living thing. So in god there is not only one person coming from wanting, and another from thinking, but in a number that has no end. So there are persons in god that have no end.
ugf_response: Man is better than other animals, so he does more things inside, because his being good is made of many parts. So the spirits that are better and simpler, do fewer things inside than man, for they do not picture things or feel them. In god there is only one real thing done, which is his true being. How there are two ways in him was shown before.
